subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath appeared and brought forth that which was inscribed in the Books of old by the Most Exalted Pen. Verily, He is the One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی ظهر و اظهر ما کان مسطورا فی کتب القبل من القلم الاعلی انه لهو
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
